backward_compatibility.rationale: Q1:B — Internal tool with no external consumers. Signature changes allowed, tests will be updated.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Q2:A — Dead code policy: delete, don't deprecate. Git preserves history.

option_selection.rationale: Stage Runner Pattern — only option aligned with Q7:A (auto-wrap) and Q8:A (declarative error policy). Best SRP, DRY, and backend merger readiness. Pattern proven in backend StageExecutor.
